title: Aterian Inc (ATER) Q3 2023 Earnings Summary
text: Aterian reported Q3 2023 net revenue of $39.7 million, down from $66.3 million in the prior year period, representing a significant contraction in sales. The company achieved a major improvement in profitability metrics. Its net loss narrowed dramatically to $6.3 million from $116.9 million year-over-year, representing a 94.6% improvement. Adjusted EBITDA loss also improved 51.3% year-over-year to $4.4 million. Total assets decreased to $82.0 million from $156.4 million, while cash declined to $27.9 million from $43.6 million. The company maintained stockholders' equity of $41.9 million against total liabilities of $40.1 million. Management projected Q4 net revenue between $28-$32 million with adjusted EBITDA losses anticipated between $6.5-$7.5 million, accounting for seasonal promotional activity. The significant improvement in net loss and adjusted EBITDA loss demonstrates the company's ability to manage costs and improve operational efficiency despite facing revenue headwinds.
